---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in RapidTicket
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or logs if available.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | <!-- e.g. macOS 14.5, Windows 11 --> |
| Node.js version | <!-- node -v --> |
| RapidTicket version / commit | <!-- git rev-parse --short HEAD --> |
| Station type | <!-- Server machine / Client station / Both --> |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (network setup, printer model, etc.).
